case_title: SPIEGLER, PHILIP JASON C/O UNDER THE SUN FLORIST et al VS ELWOOD, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL TO IRENE BRUZINSKY RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
